_comment: Pumping Test Configuration File — JSON Template. All fields shown. Required fields are marked [REQUIRED]. Paths to CSV files are relative to the location of this config file. Reference: ICRC (2011), Technical Review — Practical Guidelines for Test Pumping in Water Wells.

borehole._comment: Only name and static_level_mbd are required. All other fields are optional.
borehole.name: YOUR_BOREHOLE_NAME
